text: Hello? Hello. Hi, this is Chelsea. We pulled up your Medicare profile and there's a note showing your 2026 update hasn't been confirmed yet. We just need a quick confirmation so your coverage doesn't get interrupted. You have both part A and part B? Yes. But I'm in the nursing home and I haven't got no report on anything but they said everything was all right. Sorry, it looks like you don't qualify for the plans. Have a great day.
